Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms under Details tab
Expected Result: Billing Address and Payment Terms are present; soft-fail warning logged if either is missing

Scenario: Create a new Contact from the Account record's Contacts related list
Expected Result: Contact saved successfully; page URL contains `/Contact/`; contact URL stored for downstream tests

Scenario: Create Opportunity from Contact's Opportunities related list and verify Contact assigned as Primary Contact Role
Expected Result: Opportunity saved; URL contains `/Opportunity/`; Contact name visible in Contact Roles related list

Scenario: Create Quote from Opportunity; Browse Catalogs → select Standard Price Book → All Products → search and add product; verify product in cart
Expected Result: Quote created; product visible in quote cart/line editor

Scenario: Accept Quote → Mark as Current Status → New Contract (None type) → Activate Contract → Create Order (single) → Activate Order
Expected Result: Contract activated; Order created and activated; Order status contains 'Activat'
